urdu transliteration text:
Holding an empty pitcherAbass, Sakina is crying
HAATHO ME LIYE KHAALI KUNZAA
ABBAS SAKINA ROTI HAI

AB TAK HAI NAZAR, SUWE DARYAA
ABBAS SAKINA ROTI HAI
english translation text: Till this moment her sight is gazed at the river Abbas, Sakina is crying

urdu transliteration text:
DEKHO TO TARAI SE UTHKAR
PATHRAAI HUI SEHMISI NAZAR
english translation text: Rise from the river bank and seeHer petrified and fearful look

urdu transliteration text:
BE AAS NA HOJAYE DUKHYAA
ABBAS SAKINA ROTI HAI
english translation text: May the broken hearted child not become hopeless Abbas, Sakina is crying

urdu transliteration text:
TUM AYSE GHAYE JAAKAR NA FIRE
ITNA BHI NA SOCHA KYA HOGA
english translation text: You went in such a manner that you never turned back You didn’t even think of what would happen

urdu transliteration text:
For Allah's sake, bring the water skin (mashk)Abbas, Sakina is crying
LE AAWO KHUDAARA MASHKIZA
ABBAS SAKINA ROTI HAI

TUM LAAYE NA BHAR KAR MASHKIZA
NA AAP HI PALTE DARYAASE
english translation text: You didn't bring the filled waterskin (mashk)Neither did you return from the river

urdu transliteration text:
KYA KHUB NIBHAAYA, EHDE WAFAA
ABBAS SAKINA ROTI HAI
english translation text: How well you fulfilled your promiseAbbas, Sakina is crying

urdu transliteration text:
KHAAYE HAI TAMAACHE ZAALIM KE
MAASOOM NE NANNE GHAALON PAR
english translation text: She bore the slaps of the oppressors On her innocent small cheeks

urdu transliteration text:
IS NEEND SE CHONKO BARAYE KHUDA
ABBAS SAKINA ROTI HAI
english translation text: Wake up from this sleep for the sake of AllahAbbas, Sakina is crying

urdu transliteration text:
AMMA HAI TARAPTI DEKHO CHACHA
ASGHAR KA JO HAAL NAHI DIKHTA
english translation text: Look Uncle, my mother is so restless, She can not find Ali Asghar anywhere

urdu transliteration text:
ITNAATO BATAADO TUM HO KAHAAN
ABBAS SAKINA ROTI HAI
english translation text: Just tell me where you are Abbas, Sakina is crying

urdu transliteration text:
HAATHON ME ALAM THAAME BABA
BAANDHE HAI KAMAR KO KYUN BABA
english translation text: Baba is holding the flag Why has father tied his back

urdu transliteration text:
Look uncle, he doesn’t say anythingAbbas, Sakina is crying
KUCH KEHTE NAHI HAI DEKHO CHACHA
ABBAS SAKINA ROTI HAI

HILTI HAI ZAMEEN HILTAA HAI FALAK
HAI HAASHIMI GHAM KI JINNO MALAK
english translation text: The ground quakes, the skies quake The angels and jinn are mourning for the Hashimites

urdu transliteration text: HAI EHLE HARAM ME SHOR BARPA
english translation text: There is an uproar in the Holy household

urdu transliteration text:
Holding an empty pitcherAbass, Sakina is crying
HAATHO ME LIYE KHAALI KUNZAA
ABBAS SAKINA ROTI HAI
